message:
Add comprehensive beads for CASS Memory System implementation

Creates 32 beads (4 epics + 28 features) with full dependency structure:

## Epics Created:
1. Phase 1: Foundation + High-ROI Core (P0)
2. Phase 2: Core Pipeline + Anti-Patterns (P1)
3. Phase 3: Advanced Features + Intelligence (P2)
4. Phase 4: Polish & Integration (P2)

## Phase 1 Features (12):
- Project Setup: Bun + TypeScript + Dependencies
- Type System: Complete TypeScript Interfaces + Zod Schemas
- Utility Functions: src/utils.ts
- cass Integration Wrapper: src/cass.ts
- Secret Sanitization Pipeline (P12 - Security Critical)
- Confidence Decay + Effective Score Algorithms (P1, P4)
- Configuration Management: Load/Save/Cascade
- Playbook YAML Read/Write: src/playbook.ts
- LLM Provider Abstraction: src/llm.ts
- CLI Scaffolding: src/cass-memory.ts
- Init Command: cass-memory init
- Context Command: cass-memory context (P2 - Generator)

## Phase 2 Features (9):
- Diary Generation: cass-memory diary
- Mark Command: cass-memory mark
- Reflector Pipeline: src/reflect.ts
- Evidence-Count Gate: Pre-LLM Validator (P11)
- Curator Pipeline: Deterministic Delta Application
- Anti-Pattern Inversion (P3)
- Forget Command + Toxic Bullet Log (P8)
- Doctor Command: System Health Check (P13)
- Reflect Command: cass-memory reflect

## Phase 3 Features (3):
- Validate Command: Scientific Validation
- Stats Command: Playbook Health Dashboard (P9)
- Local Semantic Search: @xenova/transformers (P7)

## Phase 4 Features (4):
- Audit Command: cass-memory audit
- Project Command: Export to AGENTS.md
- Binary Compilation + Distribution
- Documentation: README.md + Examples

Each bead includes detailed self-documenting descriptions with:
- Purpose and background
- Implementation code/pseudocode
- Dependencies and reasoning
- Acceptance criteria

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
